name: tweetcraft-gemini
title: TweetCraft for Gemini
description: Rewrite Chinese ideas into natural English posts for X and copy them to the clipboard.
author: your-raycast-username

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: API key created in Google AI Studio. Raycast stores password preferences securely.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Gemini Model
preferences.description: The Gemini model used for rewriting.

preferences.name: networkMode
preferences.title: Network Mode
preferences.description: Auto tries the local proxy first, then a direct connection only when the proxy cannot be reached.

preferences.name: proxyUrl
preferences.title: Proxy URL
preferences.description: Your local HTTP proxy. The current setup uses port 7897.

commands.name: natural
commands.title: Natural English Post
commands.subtitle: TweetCraft
commands.description: Rewrite Chinese as natural, conversational English and copy it.

commands.name: punchy
commands.title: Punchy English Post
commands.subtitle: TweetCraft
commands.description: Rewrite Chinese as sharper English with a stronger opening and copy it.

commands.name: short
commands.title: Short English Post
commands.subtitle: TweetCraft
commands.description: Turn Chinese into a compact English post of about 140 characters and copy it.

commands.name: reply
commands.title: Natural English Reply
commands.subtitle: TweetCraft
commands.description: Rewrite Chinese as a natural English reply for X and copy it.

commands.name: check-setup
commands.title: Check Gemini Setup
commands.subtitle: TweetCraft
commands.description: Test the API key, model, proxy, and Gemini connection.

commands.name: recent-drafts
commands.title: Recent TweetCraft Drafts
commands.subtitle: TweetCraft
commands.description: Recover, copy, retry, or delete locally saved Chinese drafts and English results.
